title: cicerbita adenophora
intro: Cicerbita adenophora, also known as Tibetica or Bitter lettuce, is a plant species in the sunflower family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its bitter and slightly sweet taste, and is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. It is believed to have several health benefits, such as aiding digestion, reducing fever, and alleviating respiratory issues. Cicerbita adenophora is often used in herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
